/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--version-script=/home/pedro/CLionProjects/SDL_learning/vendored/SDL_ttf/src/SDL_ttf.sym -shared -Wl,-soname,libSDL3_ttf.so.0 -o ../../libSDL3_ttf.so.0.3.0 "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable_ttf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_gpu_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_renderer_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_surface_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_ttf.c.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pedro/CLionProjects/SDL_learning/build ../../libSDL3.so.0.5.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so
